parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value:
You are a CRM assistant. Analyse this call transcript and produce a structured summary.

Call type: {{ $json.call_type }}
Duration: {{ $json.duration_seconds }} seconds
Transcript:
{{ $json.transcript }}

Output ONLY valid JSON with these keys:
{
  "lead_score": 1-10 (10 = hot lead, 1 = not a lead),
  "intent": one sentence describing what the caller wanted,
  "pain_points": array of up to 3 specific problems mentioned,
  "next_action": specific recommended next action for the operator,
  "crm_note": 2-3 sentence professional CRM note to add to the contact record,
  "urgency": "high" | "medium" | "low"
}

parameters.query: SELECT id, name, email FROM tabLead WHERE mobile_no = $1 OR phone = $1 LIMIT 1;

additionalFields.queryParams: ={{ [`Call ${$node['Validate and Sanitise'].json.call_id} — ${$node['Parse Analysis'].json.intent}`, $node['Look Up Lead in ERPNext (PostgreSQL)'].json.id, $node['Parse Analysis'].json.crm_note] }}

nodes.name: Add CRM Note to Existing Lead

parameters.columns: call_id, caller_number, caller_name, call_type, outcome, duration_seconds, transcript, ai_summary, lead_score, urgency, next_action, recording_path, created_at
